full_name: Titanium-stabilized austenitic stainless steel X6CrNiMoTi17-12-2, material number 1.4571 (AISI 316Ti)
scope: Titanium-stabilized molybdenum-alloyed austenitic stainless steel; titanium ties up carbon to prevent chromium-carbide precipitation, giving resistance to intergranular corrosion after welding and improved strength/stability at elevated temperatures (above ~800 C).
license_note: Grade name (316Ti / 1.4571) and its nominal composition and typical property ranges are widely reproduced in free manufacturer datasheets and reference sites; no paywalled EN standard text reproduced.
